= Test Fixtures from lessmsi

== Source

These test fixtures are from the lessmsi project, from the
directory `src/Lessmsi.Tests/TestFiles`.

* Project: lessmsi
* URL: http://lessmsi.activescott.com
* Repository: https://github.com/activescott/lessmsi
* License: MIT License
* Maintainer: Scott Willeke (@activescott) and contributors

== Files Included

=== MSI Format (Windows Installer Package)

MsiInput/ directory contains:

* `putty-0.68-installer.msi` - Simple embedded CAB (2.7MB) - 10 files
* `NUnit-2.5.2.9222.msi` - Standard installer (2.4MB)
* `python-2.7.3.msi` - Larger installer (15MB)
* `vcredist.msi` + `vcredis1.cab` - External CAB reference (2.8MB + 253KB)
* `msi_with_external_cab.msi` + `msi_with_external_cab.cab` - Minimal external CAB test
* `AppleMobileDeviceSupport64.msi` - Large installer (40MB)
* `IviNetSharedComponents32_Fx20_1.3.0.msi` - NI VISA components
* `VBRuntime.msi` - Visual Basic runtime
* `Slik-Subversion-1.6.6-x64.msi` - Subversion client
* `X86 Debuggers And Tools-x86_en-us.msi` - Visual Studio debug tools
* `ExtractOnlySomeFiles.msi` - Test for partial extraction
* `Path With Spaces/spaces example.msi` - Path with spaces handling (2.4MB)
* `long-directory-name/very/unusually/long/directory/name/with/cream/sugar/and/chocolate/topping/python-2.7.3.msi` - Long path handling

=== MSP Format (Windows Installer Patch)

* `SQL2008_AS.msp` - SQL Server Analysis Services patch (22KB)
* `WPF2_32.msp` - WPF patch (22KB)
* `msxml5.msp` - MSXML patch (7.5MB)

=== Expected Output

ExpectedOutput/ directory contains CSV files with expected extraction results.
Format:

----
Path,Size,CreationTime,LastWriteTime,Attributes
\SourceDir\PFiles\PuTTY\LICENCE,1338,2017-02-18T17:10:22.0000000,2017-02-18T17:10:22.0000000,Archive
----

* Paths use Windows-style backslashes, start with `\SourceDir\`
* Size in bytes
* Timestamps in ISO 8601 format
* Attributes: `Archive`, `Hidden`, `ReadOnly`, etc.

== Usage in Omnizip

These fixtures ensure Omnizip maintains compatibility with standard
MSI extraction as implemented by lessmsi, a widely-used open-source
MSI extraction tool.

== Modifications

None. These are standard test archives from the lessmsi test suite.
